languages.text: "Почему ты считаешь убийство лидера ксеносов бесплодной затеей?"

traits.locale_text: "Почему ты считаешь убийство лидера ксеносов бесплодной затеей?"

languages.text: "Why do you think killing the leader of the xenos is a fruitless endeavour?"
languages.original_text: "Почему ты считаешь убийство лидера ксеносов бесплодной затеей?"

traits.locale_text: "Why do you think killing the leader of the xenos is a fruitless endeavour?"
"Why do you think killing the leader of the xenos is a fruitless endeavour?"
"Why do you think killing the leader of the xenos is a fruitless endeavour?"

languages.text: “你为什么觉得杀掉那个异形首领毫无意义？”
languages.original_text: "Why do you think killing the leader of the xenos is a fruitless endeavour?"

traits.locale_text: “你为什么觉得杀掉那个异形首领毫无意义？”

languages.text: «¿Por qué cree que matar al líder de los xenos es una empresa vana?».
languages.original_text: "Why do you think killing the leader of the xenos is a fruitless endeavour?"

traits.locale_text: «¿Por qué cree que matar al líder de los xenos es una empresa vana?».

languages.text: « Pourquoi pensez-vous qu'il est inutile d'éliminer le chef des xénos ? »
languages.original_text: "Why do you think killing the leader of the xenos is a fruitless endeavour?"

traits.locale_text: « Pourquoi pensez-vous qu'il est inutile d'éliminer le chef des xénos ? »

languages.text: "Zenoların başını öldürmenin neden nafile bir çaba olduğunu düşünüyorsun?"
languages.original_text: "Why do you think killing the leader of the xenos is a fruitless endeavour?"

traits.locale_text: "Zenoların başını öldürmenin neden nafile bir çaba olduğunu düşünüyorsun?"

languages.text: "Warum haltet Ihr es für ein vergebliches Unterfangen, den Anführer der Xenos zu töten?"
languages.original_text: "Why do you think killing the leader of the xenos is a fruitless endeavour?"

traits.locale_text: "Warum haltet Ihr es für ein vergebliches Unterfangen, den Anführer der Xenos zu töten?"

languages.text: 「異種族のリーダーを殺すのは無駄だと、なぜ思うのですか？」
languages.original_text: "Why do you think killing the leader of the xenos is a fruitless endeavour?"

traits.locale_text: 「異種族のリーダーを殺すのは無駄だと、なぜ思うのですか？」
